main.description: Acknowledges a record (subject) or its relationship in a context. Created in the acknowledging actor's repo to form a bidirectional link. Examples: a contributor acknowledging inclusion in an activity, an activity owner acknowledging inclusion in a collection, or a record owner acknowledging an evaluation.

subject.description: The record being acknowledged (e.g. an activity, a contributor information record, an evaluation).

context.description: Context for the acknowledgement (e.g. the collection that includes an activity, or the activity that includes a contributor). A URI for a lightweight reference or a strong reference for content-hash verification.

acknowledged.description: Whether the relationship is acknowledged (true) or rejected (false).

comment.description: Optional plain-text comment providing additional context or reasoning.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
